title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: planscanR R package BIOGAIN project (Net Biodiversity Gain spatial energy planning). provides single, unified R API (get_assessments()) fetching environmental-assessment records (EIA, SEA, follow-advice) European national portals — modelled aloftdata/getRad. v0.1 scope. Three country handlers ship: - Netherlands (get_assessments_nl()) — Commissie m.e.r. adviezenregister commissiemer.nl. - Germany (get_assessments_de()) — UVP-Verbund federated portal uvp-verbund.de. - Austria (get_assessments_at()) — Umweltbundesamt UVP-DB secure.umweltbundesamt./uvpdb. Metadata-: portal’s HTML pages document attachments sit behind Keycloak login wall; three open JSON service handlers (mapsdata, mapsgeom, vorhabenInfo) expose record metadata anonymously. handler returns rich tibble rows attachment_urls local_path always empty, date_decision always NA (portal exposes year). Reflected get_assessments_coverage()$status "supported   (metadata-)". architecture multi-country day one — adding DK / etc. pure additive change. scope v0.1. Spatial output (sf), zoning/plan documents, credential management (keyring), LLM-based classification & normalisation. flagged roadmap (§6) don’t get prematurely wedged .

what: 1a. The acquisition runbook is the central reference
title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: data-raw/biogain_acquire.R single source truth BIOGAIN data acquired processed. canonical, top--bottom pipeline — scan + score → classify → select → download / discover → report — every country runs . question “data processed?”, answer file, ad-hoc script. Consequences agent working : - Selection gate = select_assessments() (BIOGAIN ensemble: cosine classifier keywords, minus confident fossil/oil-gas/nuclear trim). DOWNLOAD DISCOVER phases gate , runbook downloads exactly records reports selected. Don’t reintroduce bare-cosine download gate. - change processing logic (selection rule, thresholds, phase behaviour, new signals) belongs file (package functions calls), runbook stays authoritative. - One-helper scripts /tmp throwaway conveniences; behaviour matters, fold back runbook.

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: Required columns (validated validate_result_schema(), every handler MUST emit right types): Conventional columns (use names portal exposes concept, cross-country tibbles can bind_rows()-ed cleanly): title, summary, native_type, jurisdiction, status, date_published, date_decision, competent_authority, proponent, file_sha256, relevance_score, relevance_model, download_status. Per-handler attachment splits. portal groups attachments named sections may add parallel list-columns. NL uses two: attachment_urls_source / local_path_source — files “Documenten waarop het advies gebaseerd” (underlying EIA/SEA reports — substantive documents downstream analysis). attachment_urls_advice / local_path_advice — files “Adviezen en persberichten” (Commissie advice + press releases). DE uses four: attachment_urls_uvp_bericht / local_path_uvp_bericht — “UVP-Bericht, ggf. Antragsunterlagen” (substantive UVP report + applicant docs). attachment_urls_berichte / local_path_berichte — “Berichte und Empfehlungen”. attachment_urls_auslegung / local_path_auslegung — “Auslegungsinformationen” (public-consultation notices). attachment_urls_weitere / local_path_weitere — “Weitere Unterlagen” (materials; often biggest section). attachment_urls / local_path remain deduplicated union (source / substantive sections first), required-columns schema always satisfied. read_record_sidecar() country-agnostic: attachment_urls_<section> list-column handler emits flows sidecar back without changes . download_status list-column (download = TRUE): one tibble per record columns url, local_path, status, size_bytes, sha256, reason. Values status: "downloaded", "cached", "skipped_size", "failed". normalisation fetch time. Status, type, jurisdiction strings stay portal’s vocabulary (Dutch / German / Danish / …). Cross-portal normalisation responsibility future classify_assessments() step, fetcher. Extra columns encouraged. Handlers can add country-specific column like — validate_result_schema() enforces required set. New conventional columns can promoted later minor release.

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: License: GPL-3. Formatter: Air line-width = 120 (see air.toml). Run air format . pushing. HTTP: every outbound call goes req_planscanr() R/utils_http.R user-agent, retry, HTTP-cache behaviour stay consistent. Caching: file cache root tools::R_user_dir("planscanR", "cache"), overridable via cache_dir argument options(planscanR.cache_dir). Layout: separate HTTP cache — sidecar JSONs cache, per-country handlers consult via sidecar_url_index() going network. [clear_cache()] removes files/ tree (optionally scoped country); pair refresh = TRUE next call want fresh fetches afterwards. download layer pre-flights every URL HEAD; files exceeding getOption("planscanR.max_file_size_mb", 50) skipped recorded download_status. Already--disk non-empty files become status = "cached" unless overwrite = TRUE. Errors carry classed conditions (planscanR_error_unsupported_country, planscanR_error_bad_input, planscanR_error_bad_schema, planscanR_warning_partial) tests can target cleanly. Tests: testthat (edition 3) + httptest2 mocks; live HTTP CI. Live tests, , live tests/manual/ git-ignored. Secrets: deferred future release; keyring dependency v0.1.

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: Every successfully processed record persisted sidecar JSON files/<country>/<document_id>/<document_id>.meta.json — written atomically inside per-record loop, interrupted run leaves N fully-indexable records disk (N orphan dirs). sidecar carries full record (country, source_portal, document_id, url, title, summary, dates, competent authority, proponent, relevance_score, etc.) plus per-file files[] array mirroring download_status columns (status, size_bytes, sha256, reason, section). Schema version: 2. sidecar authoritative cache. Per-country handlers consult sidecar_url_index(country) start every call build url -> sidecar-path lookup; URL -disk sidecar loaded JSON rather re-fetched HTTP. makes re-scoring already-scanned slice new topic essentially free (embedding compute, zero network). Pass refresh = TRUE bypass sidecar lookup force fresh detail-page fetches. Sidecar writes merge relevance_scores array: prior topic entries whose slug isn’t present current run preserved. running topic = c(wind = "...") multi-topic scan doesn’t wipe solar / power_grid scores disk — wind entry replaced. index_cache(cache_dir = NULL, country = NULL) walks every sidecar root reconstructs tibble matching planscanR schema — portal calls. Use : - re-read previously-downloaded slice offline; - enumerate ’s disk deciding else fetch; - recover manually relocating flattening files (basenames globally unique, find files/ -exec mv {} flat/ safe).

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: function thin helper returns named character vector. Three places package consume : get_assessments() / per-country handlers — pass topic argument. record’s title + summary embedded compared six topic vectors single pass; result tibble gains one relevance_score_<slug> column per topic. score_assessments() — vector, re-scoring existing tibble (e.g. one obtained index_cache()) without re-fetching. Sidecar JSON — write_sidecar = TRUE, topic gets entry per-record relevance_scores array slug names vector. Subsequent runs merge array, score_assessments() different topic set adds new entries alongside BIOGAIN ones rather clobbering . restrict sidecar specific topic set, re-score set sweep non-matching topic entries (see [/tmp/biogain_rescan.R] reference pattern).
code: options(planscanR.cache_dir = "/path/to/cache") res <- get_assessments(   "nl",   topic = biogain_assessment_topics(),   download = FALSE         # score-only; no PDFs fetched ) res$relevance_score_wind res$relevance_score_energy_transition_strategy recs   <- index_cache("/path/to/cache") scored <- score_assessments(   recs,   topic = biogain_assessment_topics(),   write_sidecar = TRUE     # persist back to the sidecars on disk )

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: Pass relevance_threshold drop records don’t clear topic. scalar threshold applies topics (record passes topic clears ); named numeric vector lets set per-topic cutoffs.
code: # Keep records that look like wind, solar, or grid (any topic >= 0.5) get_assessments("nl",   topic = biogain_assessment_topics(),   relevance_threshold = 0.5,   download = FALSE)  # Per-topic thresholds — tighter wind, looser everything else get_assessments("nl",   topic = biogain_assessment_topics(),   relevance_threshold = c(wind = 0.6,                           renewable_energy = 0.45,                           energy_transition_strategy = 0.5),   download = FALSE)

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: get_assessments() accepts optional topic parameter. set, candidate record’s title + summary embedded scored cosine similarity topic vector(s) attachments downloaded. relevance_threshold download-gate : records fall keep sidecar JSON remain returned tibble — PDFs skipped. means later re-run different threshold (none ) costs nothing network: metadata + per-file attachment URLs already disk index_cache() / sidecar-first re-fetch can pick offline. Single vs multi-topic — topic accepts either: - single character string (legacy mode): adds relevance_score + relevance_model columns; - named character vector like c(wind = "wind energy", solar = "solar energy", res = "regional energy   transition strategy"): adds one relevance_score_<slug> per topic plus shared relevance_model. Adding extra topics essentially free — per-record embed runs extra cosine per topic. relevance_threshold accepts scalar (topic ≥ scalar passes) named numeric vector matching topic slugs (named topic clears cutoff passes). offline rescoring existing tibble new topics without re-fetching anything portal, use score_assessments(records, topic, model, write_sidecar = ...). Pairs well index_cache(). Pluggable model interface (S3) - Built-default: embedding_model_minilm() — sentence-transformers paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM-L12-v2 via reticulate. Lazy Python init first use; needs reticulate::py_install("sentence-transformers") (reticulate::py_require("sentence-transformers") per session modern uv-backed config). - Custom backend: embedding_model(name, languages, embed_fn) returns S3 object participates interface without writing methods. - Required S3 methods new subclass: embed_text(), supported_languages(), model_name(). - relevance scorer warns per (country, model) record’s country language falls outside model’s documented supported_languages() list. Country → language map lives R/utils_language.R. Sidecar persistence relevance scores - Single-topic mode: legacy relevance_score + relevance_model fields. - Multi-topic mode: relevance_scores: [{topic, score, model, scored_at}, ...] array. read_record_sidecar() fans back relevance_score_<slug> columns. Old sidecars (without array) still read fine — just don’t add per-topic columns.

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: bundled Shiny app inspecting records flow pipeline building human ground-truth selection benchmark automated select_assessments() gate . Launched via exported run_biogain_review() (R/biogain_review_app.R), locates app system.file(), checks optional UI deps, forwards cache_dir/data_dir. consumer package, never modifier. reads sidecar cache read-index_cache() / score_keywords() / select_assessments(), writes three things: human review decisions, cached translations, trained selection-model artifact (selection_model.rds; see §5d). model logic lives package — app just calls train_selection_model() / predict_selection() persists result. things live - App: inst/biogain-review/app.R (UI + server) plus self-contained helpers inst/biogain-review/R/ — Shiny auto-sources R/ dir. Helpers reach package via planscanR:: / planscanR:::, app needs planscanR installed (load_all-ed dev). - data.R — load_or_build_snapshot() (walks index_cache() → enriched, scalar-column snapshot cached corpus_snapshot.rds), apply_selection() (live wrapper select_assessments()), draw_random_sample() / build_review_queue() (stratified + prioritised sampling). - store.R — review decisions human-readable CSV (reviews.csv), one row per (country, document_id, reviewer) multiple reviewers coexist; plus reviewers-name list (reviewers.txt). - funnel.R — per-stage funnel counts, interactive plotly funnel, selection_vs_human() (auto-vs-human precision/recall/F1; ground truth one decision per record via planscanR::consensus_reviews() — reviewer’s -recent verdict, kept reviewers agree, conflicting records excluded), inter_reviewer_summary(). - table.R — styled reactable (per-row + bulk keep/drop/unsure, lazy translation fold-), single-record stepper card, metric / column info popovers. - translate.R — offline Argos Translate (argostranslate via reticulate) title/summary → English. Data location (important). app’s artefacts default cache root (cache_dir, .e. alongside files/), separate user dir, reviews travel cache sync. sit root — reviews.csv, reviewers.txt, corpus_snapshot.rds, random_sample.rds, selection_model.rds — files/, clear_cache() (wipes files/) leaves intact. Override data_dir arg BIOGAIN_REVIEW_DATA. Cache root resolves: cache_dir → PLANSCANR_CACHE → getOption("planscanR.cache_dir") → package default. Translations persisted sidecars NON-DESTRUCTIVELY — record’s extras translation_* keys, via package’s merge-write — survive later scan/score/classify rewrite surface index_cache(). CTranslate2 forced single-threaded (OMP_NUM_THREADS=1) avoid OpenMP/Shiny segfault. Inter-reviewer workflow. reviewer name required classifying (enforced load modal + server gates). new reviewer’s queue first serves records others reviewed haven’t (measure cross-reviewer agreement); caught sample fresh, unreviewed records. Deps Suggests (shiny, bslib, reactable, plotly, htmltools); app excluded R CMD check/build runtime data dir never shipped. launcher errors helpfully Suggested package missing.

what: 5d. Learned selection model (supervised, from human labels)
title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: trainable counterpart hand-tuned select_assessments() rule: instead -ing three signals fixed thresholds, learns keep/drop decision review app’s reviews.csv labels per-record scores already sidecars. Lives entirely package (app consumer, §5c). Files: R/select_features.R, R/select_learner.R, R/train_selection.R. Feature contract — selection_features(). single function training prediction call (train/serve skew). Default feature set 6 relevance_score_<slug> cosine scores + 13 class_score_<label> classifier scores + kw_total, already persisted sidecars surfaced index_cache(). Missing/NA numerics → 0. Deliberately country-agnostic model transfers new portal; country / native_type opt-via include = default. Pluggable learner — selection_learner*(). Mirrors embedding_model() / classifier S3 pattern, built tidymodels. built-selection_learner_logistic() uses base-R glm engine (needs tidymodels glue: parsnip / recipes / rsample / workflows — Suggests). use another algorithm, wrap parsnip classification spec generic selection_learner(name, spec, engine_pkg = ...); engine_pkg lets training fail early clear message engine package isn’t installed. selection_learners(available_only = TRUE) returns built-ins tidymodels glue present (app dropdown). Specs built lazily, learner can listed without parsnip present. confusion, default unbiased source == "random" sample — directly comparable selection_vs_human() heuristic, train--test inflation. predict_selection() adds select_prob + selected_model. selection_cv_metrics(model, threshold) re-scores stored OOF predictions threshold retrain (app’s threshold slider). yet wired biogain_acquire.R. Intentional: prove learned gate beats heuristic first. , runbook / select_assessments() can gate predict_selection().

text: Scoring gives numbers; select_assessments() turns single keep--drop decision. combines three complementary signals — relevance score , topic classifier, count energy-related keywords — marks record selected signal points “relevant”, unless record clearly something -topic (fossil power nuclear). result adds selected column can filter . title: Supported sources
text: [!WARNING] None portals expose contractually stable API. Three four handlers parse HTML detail pages rvest; fourth uses undocumented JSON service. operators can change CSS class, rename field, slip login wall front endpoint without warning, corresponding handler break — sometimes silently. Treat results scepticism scraping pipeline deserves, please file issue spot drift. title: Supported sources
text: Portal: Commissie m.e.r. adviezenregister (commissiemer.nl/adviezen) Status: supported — full records document downloads. Authentication: none. Coverage: ~3,600 advisory records. Throttle: ~1 request/second default (getOption("planscanR.nl_throttle_rate")). URL enumeration driven portal’s sitemap index (wp-sitemap.xml, following advice-sitemap* sub-sitemaps). Per-record metadata parsed detail page rvest persisted sidecar JSON, re-running slice essentially free cache warm. Filter coverage. Free-text query, date_range (matched date_decision), province (substring match competent_authority) honoured. portal’s taxonomy facets — theme, advice_type, status — driven client-side FacetWP layer yield programmatic access; arguments accepted forward compatibility currently emit one-shot warning. Documents. Detail pages group PDFs two -page sections, exposed separate list-columns (attachment_urls_source deduplicated attachment_urls union). See ?get_assessments_nl section layout.

title: Supported sources
text: Portal: UVP-Verbund (uvp-verbund.de) Status: supported — full records document downloads. Authentication: none. Coverage: ~24,289 records federated across federal-state authorities (full register). portal exposes sitemap, OAI-PMH, CSW endpoint. Enumeration goes portal’s Solr-backed full-text search (/freitextsuche). query supplied handler sends wildcard q=*:*, paginates full register (~2,429 pages 10 records ). toggle_procedure= parameter explicitly set empty value portal silently restrict results currently-running last-year-modified procedures. Filter coverage. query passed straight server-side q parameter (real full-text search, client-side substring match). date_range matches detail-page “Zuletzt geändert” timestamp, exposed date_decision. jurisdiction substring match federal-state partner (e.g. "Bayern", "Baden-Württemberg"). Documents. Detail pages group documents open-ended h4.title-font section headings. heading becomes attachment_urls_<slug> / local_path_<slug> column; known headings get curated slug (uvp_bericht, berichte, entscheidung, auslegung, weitere) unknown heading auto-slugged title new section type appears without code change. See ?get_assessments_de full layout.

title: Supported sources
text: Portal: Umweltbundesamt UVP-DB (secure.umweltbundesamt./uvpdb/public) Status: supported (metadata-) — documents sit behind Keycloak login wall retrievable version. Authentication: none metadata. Coverage: ~500 procedures (full register small). public HTML pages portal sit behind Keycloak login, three JSON service handlers open: mapsdata, mapsgeom, vorhabenInfo. Enumeration single mapsdata call returns full index keyed Aktenzahl; per-record detail one vorhabenInfo call per v2id. pagination, CSRF, session required. Filter coverage. query case-insensitive substring match title + summary. date_range matched record’s year (treated Jan 1 – Dec 31 span) — date_decision always NA, anonymous service handlers expose decision last-modified timestamp. jurisdiction substring match comma-joined Austrian federal-state list ("Wien" works, "Bayern" ). Documents. available anonymous callers. Every record returns attachment_urls = character(0). download argument accepted API symmetry effect. need attachments, point get_assessments(..., discover = TRUE) web-search backend — see [?discover_attachments].

title: Supported sources
text: Portal: Danmarks Miljøportal EA-Hub (eahub.miljoeportal.dk) Status: supported (metadata-) — full metadata polygon geometry fetched; document downloads future addition. Authentication: none. Coverage: ~2,700 records (EIA, “miljøvurdering af projekter”, SEA, “miljøvurdering af planer”). Throttle: 5 requests/second default (getOption("planscanR.dk_throttle_rate")), geometry fetch one tiny GET per record--geometry. EA-Hub Vue SPA sitting public REST API (Swagger /api/swagger/v1/swagger.json). One POST /assessments/search call returns entire register — row already carries title, year range, status, authorities, EIA-Directive Annex /II categories, plan types/categories, hasGeometry flag — detail call needed scan phase. Geometry. Records hasGeometry == TRUE carry polygon (typically MULTIPOLYGON EPSG:25832 / ETRS89-UTM32N). write_sidecar = TRUE, geometry fetched GET /assessments/{id}/geometry saved next sidecar <document_id>.geometry.geojson; sidecar carries geometry_path geometry_crs downstream consumption sf. Filter coverage. query forwarded API’s server-side freeText. assessment_type ("", "Plans", "Project") honoured. date_range matched client-side record’s fromYear/toYear (treated Jan 1 – Dec 31 spans); date_decision always NA EA-Hub exposes year fields, decision timestamp. Documents. EA-Hub exposes PDFs public Azure blob URLs reachable via GET /assessments/{id}/documents/{docId}/links, resolving costs extra HTTP call per document. current handler scan + classify ; future release add download phase.

title: Validate a candidate (record, URL) pair against a downloaded PDF. — discover_validate
text: Aktenzahl exact — country's primary identifier appears verbatim PDF text. Strongest signal. Title overlap (hybrid count/density) — distinguishing title tokens (title tokens minus country's stoplist) appear least PDF text, project mentioned substantively: either >= 5 total distinguishing-token occurrences, (>= 2 total >= 0.4 occurrences per scanned page). dual rule keeps short focused documents (1-page Kundmachungen 3 mentions) rejecting long documents mention project passing (97-page UVEs 2 mentions buried comparative section). Also requires least one generic title token text PDF mentioning place name without UVP language pass. Extra-signal presence — least one country config's extra_signals (e.g. "UVP-G 2000") PDF, hybrid count/density rule holds. Semantic backup — cosine similarity first-10-pages text record's title+summary clears semantic_threshold (default 0.5), using relevance model. fires none . single signal passing sufficient. result reports signal(s) fired calling code can apply stricter precision policies wants.

title: Retrieve environmental-assessment records from a national portal. — get_assessments
text: country Character scalar, ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code (case). v0.1 supports "nl", "de", "". See supported_countries(). date_range Optional length-2 vector c(, ) Date, POSIXct, character. Filters date_published / date_decision semantics decided per handler. limit Maximum number records return (default Inf). download Logical. TRUE (default), attachment files referenced record downloaded local cache. FALSE, metadata returned; local_path character(0) every row. cache_dir Optional cache root. Defaults tools::R_user_dir("planscanR", "cache"). overwrite Logical. TRUE, re-download attachments even cached copy exists. max_file_size_mb Numeric cap (MiB) per-file download size. URLs whose announced actual size exceeds cap skipped recorded download_status column status "skipped_size". NULL (default) defers getOption("planscanR.max_file_size_mb", 50); Inf disables cap. write_sidecar Logical. TRUE (default), every returned record persisted <document_id>.meta.json file alongside attachments cache can re-indexed offline via index_cache(). refresh Logical. FALSE (default), records URLs already sidecar JSON disk loaded directly sidecar — detail-page HTTP request . makes re-scoring new topics essentially free slice cached. Set TRUE force fresh detail-page fetches (useful portal genuinely changed). topic Optional character vector topic phrases. Pass single string (e.g. "wind energy infrastructure") named vector like c(wind = "wind energy", solar = "solar energy", res = "regional energy transition strategy"). candidate record's title+summary embedded per call scored cosine similarity every topic, attachments downloaded. Adds one relevance_score_<slug> column per topic plus shared relevance_model. Unnamed topics get auto-slugified phrase. Adding extra topics costs essentially nothing — per-record embed expensive step runs . Every scored record sidecar'd returned regardless score. relevance_threshold Optional cutoff [-1, 1]. affects downloading: records score threshold still appear returned tibble still get sidecar JSON disk — PDF attachments skipped. lets re-run different threshold (threshold) later without re-hitting portal. Scalar threshold: PDFs downloaded topic clears . Named numeric vector (e.g. c(wind = 0.5, solar = 0.4)): per-topic cutoffs, downloads happen named topic clears cutoff. NULL (default) score-; every record's PDFs downloaded (download = TRUE). relevance_model planscanR_embedding_model. Defaults embedding_model_minilm() (sentence-transformers paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM-L12-v2 via reticulate). Pass custom one built embedding_model() plug different backend. discover Logical. title: Apply the BIOGAIN selection rule to scored + classified records. — select_assessments
text: records logical selected column added (cosine_max, cosine_relevant, keyword columns already present).

title: Apply the BIOGAIN selection rule to scored + classified records. — select_assessments
text: embedding cosine score clears relevance threshold, classifier labels relevant (renewable-energy) type, contains least kw_min keyword hits — confidently -target (classified fossil power, oil/gas extraction, nuclear nonrenewable_score). Rationale (NL analysis): three signals complementary — cosine score misses near-threshold energy records, classifier mislabels negative classes, keyword layer catches explicit mentions two dilute. Taking union favours recall (step runs acquisition; precision can still improved downstream), fossil/oil-gas/nuclear trim drops records clearly -target BIOGAIN.

title: planscanR 0.0.0.9000
text: Initial development scaffold. Austria handler get_assessments_at() fetches record metadata Umweltbundesamt UVP-DB (secure.umweltbundesamt./uvpdb). Metadata-: portal’s documents sit behind login, attachment_urls empty. Topic relevance scoring. Pass topic get_assessments() (use score_assessments() existing records) rank record closely title summary match one topics, via multilingual text-similarity model. biogain_assessment_topics() returns six energy topics BIOGAIN project uses. embedding model pluggable embedding_model(). Lexical keyword scoring (score_keywords(), biogain_keyword_lexicon()) counts energy-related terms complementary signal. Classification. classify_assessments() assigns record canonical class via pluggable zero-shot classifier (classify_model_zeroshot()). Selection. select_assessments() combines relevance, classifier, keyword signals single keep/drop decision. model learned human keep/drop labels (train_selection_model() / predict_selection()) also available; built-learner logistic regression. Attachment discovery. portals don’t expose documents directly, discover_attachments() finds validates PDFs pluggable web-search backend (search_backend_tavily()). Review app. run_biogain_review() launches bundled Shiny app inspecting records flow pipeline building human ground-truth selection benchmark automated decision . Unified entry function get_assessments() dispatches country code. Netherlands handler get_assessments_nl() fetches Commissie m.e.r. adviezenregister (commissiemer.nl) via sitemap-based URL discovery detail-page parsing. Supports query, date_range, province filters client-side; theme, advice_type, status arguments accepted warning taxonomy filtering yet honoured. Required-columns return schema, validated validate_result_schema(): country, source_portal, document_id, url, retrieved_at, attachment_urls, local_path. Additional columns encouraged free-form. Attachments downloaded tools::R_user_dir("planscanR", "cache") files/<country>/<document_id>/. get_assessments_coverage() lists supported countries, portals, search-facet vocabularies handler accepts. Germany handler get_assessments_de() fetches federated UVP-Verbund portal (uvp-verbund.de). URL enumeration uses portal’s Solr-backed /freitextsuche search (q=*:* everything); detail-page parsing pulls title, summary, competent_authority, jurisdiction (federal-state partner), native_type (UVP-Kategorie) last-modified date. Attachments split four list-columns mirroring -page section headings: attachment_urls_uvp_bericht, _berichte, _auslegung, _weitere (plus deduplicated attachment_urls union). relevance_threshold now download-gate . Records score threshold still get sidecar JSON disk still appear returned tibble — PDF attachments skipped. makes re-runs different threshold free network. Applies NL DE handlers. Sidecar JSONs now carry URL list (per-URL section tags) even download = FALSE — known -yet-fetched URL gets pending row download_status. read_record_sidecar() / index_cache() fan per-section URLs back attachment_urls_<section> / local_path_<section> columns regardless country, now also restores country-specific extras (e.g. DE’s native_type).
